name: xf_cep_ex_plain_order_set
drl: rule R when exists D() P() then end
comment: OPEN (D-161 recon): population exemplar of the order family's SET compound - initial satisfy fires [3,...] vs oracle [1,...] (order) AND the ep2 re-satisfy under-fires (engine 6 vs oracle 8 total; a delete-unsatisfy then D-reinsert re-satisfy epoch). Same D-162 family as xf_cep_ex_backlog_order. ⇒ D-162 GRADUATED: the ENGINE PORT LANDED (quiescence eval + PxShadow — see xf_cep_ex_backlog_order). The ep1 delete now evaluates at ITS boundary (the exists child dies; the same-epoch staged P activations cancel) and the ep2 re-satisfy re-fires the WHOLE join memory in the machine order [6,4,5,1,3] — the 6-vs-8 SET compound and the initial-fire order both pin here.
